commands.review_summary:
The PR combines a Discord search guildId/query fallback with tests and a very large branch that also changes release workflows, CI, Docker, docs, mobile apps, changelog, and other unrelated surfaces.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main still requires guildId for Discord searchMessages, and the linked report includes live ToolInputError logs from a guild-channel session. I did not run a live Discord bot session in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed because the branch has a protected security label, dirty merge state, unrelated security-sensitive workflow changes, and a contributor-side live proof gap.
